issue_title: feat(layout): replace LeftPaneTabSwitcher with VS Code-style Activity Bar + relocate History pane (PC)
issue_body_source: Run `gh issue view 727 --json body --jq '.body'` to get the latest (Stage 4 applied) Issue body.
scope_summary: PC版 Worktree詳細画面のレイアウトを VS Code 風 Activity Bar + History 独立カラム化に再構成する。モバイル経路は一切変更しない。
key_invariants: MUST NOT touch mobile path WorktreeDetailSubComponents.tsx (case 'memo' / case 'history' / Mobile HistoryPane Message/Git sub-tab).
MUST NOT delete NotesAndLogsPane.tsx (mobile depends on it).
MUST keep `historySubTab` state at WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx:293 alive (mobile MobileContent props depend on it).
MUST keep existing deep-link URLs (?pane=…) functional with updated activity mapping.
MUST keep WorktreeDesktopLayout's mobile mode (useIsMobile=true) visually compatible.

tasks.deliverable: ActivityId type, ACTIVITIES array (lucide-react icons: File, GitBranch, StickyNote, Calendar, Bot, Timer), ACTIVITY_BAR_STORAGE_KEY='commandmate.worktree.activeActivity', DEFAULT_ACTIVITY='files'

useActivityBarState() returning {active, setActive, toggle}. Persists last selected ActivityId to localStorage (null/closed state NOT persisted). On hydration before localStorage read, returns DEFAULT_ACTIVITY='files' for deterministic SSR-CSR. Invalid stored value → DEFAULT_ACTIVITY.

useHistoryPaneState() returning {visible, width, toggle, setWidth}. Persists to commandmate.worktree.historyVisible (boolean) and commandmate.worktree.historyWidth (number). Default visible=true, width=320.

Add WorktreeUIAction union entries: SET_ACTIVE_ACTIVITY, TOGGLE_ACTIVITY, TOGGLE_HISTORY_PANE, SET_HISTORY_WIDTH. Extend WorktreeUIActions interface + reducer cases. Keep SET_LEFT_PANE_TAB (mobile compat).
Extend LayoutState with activityBar: {active: ActivityId | null} and historyPane: {visible: boolean, width: number, collapsed: boolean}. Keep legacy leftPaneTab / leftPaneCollapsed (mobile compat).

48px vertical bar, 6 ACTIVITIES icons. role='tablist' aria-orientation='vertical', each button role='tab' aria-selected aria-label aria-controls='worktree-activity-pane'. Tab + ArrowUp/ArrowDown + Enter/Space keyboard. Tooltip on hover. Re-clicking active icon calls toggle (closes). id='worktree-activity-bar'.

Container that renders the correct child for active ActivityId. Each child wrapped in ErrorBoundary. id='worktree-activity-pane'. Cases: 'files' → FileTreeView + SearchBar + handlers, 'git' → GitPane, 'notes' → MemoPane, 'schedules' → ExecutionLogPane, 'agent' → AgentSettingsPane, 'timer' → TimerPane. Receives worktreeId + necessary callbacks via props.
Add onCollapse?: () => void prop. Render '<' collapse button in header (only when onCollapse provided). Existing functionality preserved.

PC mode does NOT render Message/Git sub-tab (current implementation has no sub-tab inside HistoryPane itself; sub-tab UI is in WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx parent. So this task is satisfied by removing the parent's sub-tab UI in Phase 5).

Replace 2-column props {leftPane, rightPane, leftPaneCollapsed, onToggleLeftPane} with 4-column props {activityBar, activityPane | null, historyPane | null, rightPane, activityPaneWidth, historyPaneWidth, onActivityPaneResize, onHistoryPaneResize, historyPaneCollapsed, onToggleHistoryPane}. Layout: [ActivityBar 48px固定] + Resizer + [ActivityPane可変] + Resizer + [HistoryPane可変] + Resizer + [Right]. When ActivityPane=null hide column+resizer. When HistoryPane collapsed, show 24px '>' expand bar (Issue #688 pattern). DOM IDs: worktree-activity-bar / worktree-activity-pane / worktree-history-pane / worktree-right-pane. Mobile (useIsMobile=true) keeps existing 2-pane swipe behavior by composing activity/history/right into left+right.
Remove LeftPaneTabSwitcher import. Add useActivityBarState, useHistoryPaneState, ActivityBar, ActivityPane imports.
Replace useFilePolling enabled condition: state.layout.leftPaneTab === 'files' → activeActivity === 'files'.
Remove Message/Git sub-tab UI (lines ~1518-1568 in current file) from PC desktop path. KEEP historySubTab state (line 293) — it is consumed by MobileContent props (lines ~1937-1938).

Split leftPaneMemo (line ~1507-1623, 38 deps) into activityPaneMemo and historyPaneMemo, each with minimal deps. Add maintenance comment '// MAINTENANCE NOTE (Issue #411 R3-007 / Issue #727): add new props to deps array'.

Replace LeftPaneTabSwitcher render with <ActivityBar> + <ActivityPane>. Swap WorktreeDesktopLayout props to new 4-column shape. PC actions use new setActiveActivity/toggleHistoryPane; mobile actions (in MobileContent) keep using legacy setLeftPaneTab.

Add toActivityId(pane: DeepLinkPane): ActivityId | null helper: git→git, logs→schedules, notes→notes, agent→agent, timer→timer, files→files, history→null, terminal/info→null. Add activityId to UseWorktreeTabStateReturn. Keep existing toLeftPaneTab/toHistorySubTab for mobile compat. Add comment in deep-link-validator about logs→schedules.

update: tests/unit/components/worktree/WorktreeDetailRefactored.test.tsx (replace LeftPaneTabSwitcher mock with ActivityBar mock, 11 testid references)

acceptance_criteria_summary: See Issue #727 body (run gh issue view 727). Top-level: Activity Bar (6 icons, keyboard nav, aria), Activity Pane (6 activities, polling gate), History Pane (collapse, resize, localStorage), Deep-link (?pane= mapping), Mobile path unchanged, Lint/TSC/Test/Build all pass.
completion_signals: npm run test:unit → all pass (existing + 4 new tests)
Manual: dev server runs, Activity 6 switching works, History collapse works, deep link ?pane=git/notes/logs/files/history works
